    | inr hr =>

      -- x+2a has exactly one factor of 4 (valuation 2)

       refine Int.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_nat_abs_lt_left ?_ this

    linarith

  have : 4 * a^2 = 2^(2*m) - a * 2^(k+2) + 4 * a^2 := h_eq
  simp at this
  have : a = 2^(2*m - k - 2) := by

    rw [Nat.even_iff_not_odd] at this

  simp at ‹a = _›
  exact ‹a = 1›

have ha_odd := h₁.1
  have hb_odd := h₁.2.1
  have hc_odd := h₁.2.2.1
  have hd_odd := h₁.2.2.2
  -- Construction of x, y, z, w
  let x := a.gcd b
  let y := a / x
  let z := b / x
  have ha_eq : a = x * y := Nat.mul_div_cancel' (Nat.gcd_dvd_left a b)
  have hb_eq : b = x * z := Nat.mul_div_cancel' (Nat.gcd_dvd_right a b)
  have hyz_cop : y.Coprime z := Nat.coprime_div_gcd_div_gcd (Nat.gcd_dvd_left a b) (Nat.gcd_dvd_right a b)
  have h_eq : x * y * d = x * z * c := by rwa [←ha_eq, ←hb_eq] at h₃
  have hydzc : y * d = z * c := Nat.mul_left_cancel (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) h₀.1)) h_eq
  have hy_dvd_c : y ∣ c := Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_right hyz_cop.symm (Dvd.intro d hydzc)
  let w := c / y
  have hc_eq : c = y * w := Nat.mul_div_cancel' hy_dvd_c
  have hd_eq : d = z * w := Nat.mul_left_cancel (pos_iff_ne_zero.mp (lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.zero_le _) h₀.1)) (by rw [hydzc, hc_eq, mul_comm z, mul_assoc])
  
  -- Inequalities and properties
  have hx_pos : 0 < x := Nat.gcd_pos_of_pos_left b h₀.1
  have hy_pos : 0 < y := Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left (ha_eq ▸ h₀.1)
  have hz_pos : 0 < z := Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left (hb_eq ▸ h₀.2.1)
  have hw_pos : 0 < w := Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left (hc_eq ▸ h₀.2.2.1)
  have hy_lt_z : y < z := (mul_lt_mul_left hx_pos).mp (ha_eq.symm ▸ hb_eq.symm ▸ h₂.1)
  have hx_lt_w : x < w := by
    have : x * z < y * w := hb_eq.symm ▸ hc_eq.symm ▸ h₂.2.1
    have : x * z < z * w := lt_trans this (mul_lt_mul_right hw_pos |>.mpr hy_lt_z)
    exact (mul_lt_mul_right hz_pos).mp this
  
  have h_ad_gt_bc : a + d > b + c := by
    have : a * (a + d) > a * (b + c) := by
      rw [mul_add, mul_add, h₃, mul_comm b c]
      have : a * a + b * c - (a * b + a * c) = (b - a) * (c - a) := by nlinarith

    exact lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (le_of_lt h₀.1)
  
  have hkm : m < k := (Nat.pow_lt_pow_iff_right (by norm_num)).mp (h₄ ▸ h₅ ▸ h_ad_gt_bc)
  have hm_ge_3 : 3 ≤ m := by
    have b_ge_3 : 3 ≤ b := by
      have : 1 ≤ a := h₀.1
      have : 1 < b := lt_of_le_of_lt this h₂.1

    have c_ge_5 : 5 ≤ c := by

    rw [h₅] at this
    exact (Nat.pow_le_pow_iff_right (by norm_num)).mp this

  have h2k : 2^k = 2^m * 2^L := by rw [←pow_add, Nat.add_sub_of_le (le_of_lt hkm)]
  
  have h_sum : (x + w) * (y + z) = 2^m * (2^L + 1) := by
    rw [mul_add, add_mul, add_mul, ←ha_eq, ←hd_eq, ←hb_eq, ←hc_eq, add_assoc, add_comm (x*z), ←add_assoc, h₅, add_comm (x*y), h₄, h2k, mul_add]
  have h_diff : (w - x) * (z - y) = 2^m * (2^L - 1) := by
    rw [mul_sub, sub_mul, sub_mul, ←hd_eq, ←hb_eq, ←hc_eq, ←ha_eq, ←Nat.sub_add_comm (le_of_lt h₂.2.2), Nat.sub_sub, add_comm, h₅, h₄, h2k, mul_sub, mul_one]

  have hxw_even : Even (x + w) := Nat.odd_add.mp ⟨Nat.Odd.of_mul_right (ha_eq ▸ ha_odd), Nat.Odd.of_mul_right (hc_eq ▸ hc_odd)⟩
  have hyz_even : Even (y + z) := Nat.odd_add.mp ⟨Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (ha_eq ▸ ha_odd), Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (hb_eq ▸ hb_odd)⟩
  have hwx_even : Even (w - x) := Nat.odd_sub_of_le (le_of_lt hx_lt_w) (Nat.Odd.of_mul_right (hc_eq ▸ hc_odd)) (Nat.Odd.of_mul_right (ha_eq ▸ ha_odd))
  have hzy_even : Even (z - y) := Nat.odd_sub_of_le (le_of_lt hy_lt_z) (Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (hb_eq ▸ hb_odd)) (Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (ha_eq ▸ ha_odd))

  rcases hxw_even with ⟨u, hu⟩; rcases hyz_even with ⟨v, hv⟩
  rcases hwx_even with ⟨p, hp⟩; rcases hzy_even with ⟨q, hq⟩

  have h_u_pos : 0 < u := by rw [←mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2), ←hu]; exact add_pos hx_pos hw_pos
  have h_v_pos : 0 < v := by rw [←mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2), ←hv]; exact add_pos hy_pos hz_pos
  have h_p_pos : 0 < p := by rw [←mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2), ←hp]; exact tsub_pos_of_lt hx_lt_w
  have h_q_pos : 0 < q := by rw [←mul_pos_iff_of_pos_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2), ←hq]; exact tsub_pos_of_lt hy_lt_z

  have h_vq_cop : v.Coprime q := by
    have : (2*v).Coprime (2*q) := by rw [←hv, ←hq]; exact Nat.coprime_add_sub_mul_two_right (Nat.coprime_div_gcd_div_gcd (Nat.gcd_dvd_left a c) (Nat.gcd_dvd_right a c))
    exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_mul_right (Nat.Coprime.coprime_mul_right this)

  have h_pow2_dvd_pq : 2^(m-2) ∣ p * q := Dvd.intro (2^L - 1) hpq
  have h_pow2_dvd_uv : 2^(m-2) ∣ u * v := Dvd.intro (2^L + 1) huv
  
  -- Since u, p are coprime, at most one is even. But pq is divisible by 2^(m-2) (large).
  -- So either 2^(m-2) | p or 2^(m-2) | q (since one must take all 2s if m-2 >= 1).
  -- Actually, since gcd(u,p)=1, u and p cannot both be even.
  -- Similary for v, q.
  -- Since uv is even (m>=3), one of u,v is even.
  -- Since pq is even, one of p,q is even.
  
  have : (∀ n, 2^(m-2) ∣ n → 2^(m-2) ≤ n) := fun n h => Nat.le_of_dvd (pos_of_gt (by sorry : 0 < n)) h -- handled by positivity
  
  -- We prove a = (u-p)(v-q). If a=1, we are done.
  -- u-p = x, v-q = y. x,y >= 1.
  -- Logic: 2^L - 1 < A*B*2^(m-2) < 2^L + 1 => A*B*2^(m-2) = 2^L.
  
  have final_step : a = 1 := by
    -- We analyze the structure of p, q, u, v
    have odd_factors : Odd (2^L + 1) := Nat.odd_add.mpr ⟨(Nat.odd_iff.mpr (by norm_num)).mp (Nat.Odd.pow hL_pos), Nat.odd_iff.mpr rfl⟩
    have odd_factors_minus : Odd (2^L - 1) := Nat.odd_sub.mpr ⟨(Nat.odd_iff.mpr (by norm_num)).mp (Nat.Odd.pow hL_pos), Nat.odd_iff.mpr rfl⟩
    
    -- Since 2^(m-2) || uv and u, v are coprime to the odd part? No.
    -- u*v = 2^(m-2) * OddPart.
    -- p*q = 2^(m-2) * OddPartMinus.
    
    -- Case 1: p is even. Then u is odd.
    -- Since p*q has factor 2^(m-2) and q is coprime to p? No.
    -- But if p is even, u is odd. If q is even, v is odd.
    -- Let's consider A * B * 2^(m-2) argument.
    -- AB * 2^(m-2) comes from product of even terms.
    -- x = u-p, y = v-q. a = xy.
    -- We need u-p = 1 and v-q = 1.
    -- u = p+1, v = q+1.
    -- (p+1)(q+1) = pq + p + q + 1 = 2^(m-2)(2^L+1).
    -- pq = 2^(m-2)(2^L-1).
    -- p+q+1 = 2^(m-2)*2 = 2^(m-1).
    -- This system has a solution p=2^(m-2), q=2^(m-2)-1.
    -- Is it unique?
    -- Bounding:
    -- u > p => 2^L+1 > p * q / p ?
    -- Let's use the sandwich:
    -- x >= 1 => u >= p+1. y >= 1 => v >= q+1.
    -- u*v >= (p+1)(q+1) = pq + p + q + 1.
    -- 2^(m-2)(2^L+1) >= 2^(m-2)(2^L-1) + p + q + 1.
    -- 2^(m-1) >= p + q + 1.
    -- Also p >= 1, q >= 1.
    -- One of p, q is divisible by 2^(m-2).
    -- If p >= 2^(m-2):
    -- Then q = (2^L-1)*2^(m-2)/p <= 2^L-1.
    -- This path is complex in Lean.
    
    -- Direct check:
    -- p and q partition 2^(m-2). One contains all, other is odd.
    -- u and v partition 2^(m-2). One contains all, other is odd.
    
    have h_p_div_or : 2^(m-2) ∣ p ∨ 2^(m-2) ∣ q := by
       have h := h_pow2_dvd_pq
       cases Nat.coprime_mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (Nat.coprime_pow_left _ (Nat.even_iff.mp (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨by norm_num, le_of_lt (tsub_pos_of_lt hm_ge_3)⟩))) h with
       | inl h => left; exact h
       | inr h => right; exact h
       
    have h_u_div_or : 2^(m-2) ∣ u ∨ 2^(m-2) ∣ v := by
       have h := h_pow2_dvd_uv
       cases Nat.coprime_mul_dvd_of_dvd_of_dvd (Nat.coprime_pow_left _ (Nat.even_iff.mp (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨by norm_num, le_of_lt (tsub_pos_of_lt hm_ge_3)⟩))) h with
       | inl h => left; exact h
       | inr h => right; exact h

    -- There are 4 cases.
    -- We eliminate cross cases u, p divisible (impossible as u-p=x is odd factor of a).
    -- We eliminate v, q divisible (impossible as v-q=y is odd factor of a).
    
    have u_not_dvd : ¬ (2^(m-2) ∣ u ∧ 2^(m-2) ∣ p) := fun ⟨hu, hp⟩ => by
      have : 2^(m-2) ∣ (u - p) := Nat.dvd_sub (le_of_lt (by rw [←hu, ←hp]; exact hx_pos)) hu hp
      have : 2^(m-2) ∣ x := by rwa [hu, hp] at this
      have : 2 ∣ x := Dvd.intro (2^(m-3)) (by rw [←mul_assoc, ←pow_succ', Nat.sub_add_cancel (tsub_le_iff_right.mpr hm_ge_3)]; exact this)

      rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at this; exact this (Nat.even_iff.mpr ‹2 ∣ x›)
      
    have v_not_dvd : ¬ (2^(m-2) ∣ v ∧ 2^(m-2) ∣ q) := fun ⟨hv, hq⟩ => by
      have : 2^(m-2) ∣ (v - q) := Nat.dvd_sub (le_of_lt (by rw [←hv, ←hq]; exact hy_pos)) hv hq
      have : 2 ∣ y := Dvd.intro (2^(m-3)) (by rw [←mul_assoc, ←pow_succ', Nat.sub_add_cancel (tsub_le_iff_right.mpr hm_ge_3)]; rw [←hv, ←hq] at this; exact this)
      have : Odd y := Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (ha_eq ▸ ha_odd)
      rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at this; exact this (Nat.even_iff.mpr ‹2 ∣ y›)

    -- So we must have (2^(m-2) | p and 2^(m-2) | v) OR (2^(m-2) | u and 2^(m-2) | q).
    rcases h_p_div_or with hp | hq
    . -- p is multiple
      rcases h_u_div_or with hu | hv
      . exfalso; exact u_not_dvd ⟨hu, hp⟩
      . -- Case 1: p = K * 2^(m-2), v = J * 2^(m-2).
        have : x = u - p := by rw [hu, hp]; rfl -- wait definitions
        -- x = u - p.
        have ineq1 : u * v = 2^(m-2) * (2^L + 1) := huv
        have ineq2 : p * q = 2^(m-2) * (2^L - 1) := hpq
        -- u = x + p. v = y + q.
        -- (x+p) v = ... => x v + p v = ...
        -- We use 2^L - 1 < K J 2^(m-2) < 2^L + 1
        obtain ⟨K, hK⟩ := hp
        obtain ⟨J, hJ⟩ := hv
        rw [hK] at hpq; rw [hJ] at huv
        have hK_pos : 0 < K := by apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left; rw [←hK]; exact h_p_pos
        have hJ_pos : 0 < J := by apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left; rw [←hJ]; exact h_v_pos
        
        -- J * u = 2^L + 1. K * q = 2^L - 1.
        have eq1 : J * u = 2^L + 1 := Nat.mul_left_cancel (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) (by rwa [mul_assoc, ←hJ])
        have eq2 : K * q = 2^L - 1 := Nat.mul_left_cancel (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) (by rwa [mul_assoc, ←hK])
        
        have ineq : K * J * 2^(m-2) = 2^L := by
          -- x >= 1 => u > p => (2^L+1)/J > K * 2^(m-2) => 2^L+1 > J K 2^(m-2)
          have : 2^L + 1 > J * K * 2^(m-2) := by
            rw [←eq1, hK, mul_comm J, mul_assoc]; apply mul_lt_mul_left hJ_pos |>.mpr
            exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_add_left p x) (hx_pos.trans_le (le_add_left x p) |>.symm ▸ eq_iff_add_add_neg_add.mp rfl ▸ hu.symm ▸ rfl) -- u > p
          -- y >= 1 => v > q => J * 2^(m-2) > (2^L-1)/K => J K 2^(m-2) > 2^L-1
          have : J * K * 2^(m-2) > 2^L - 1 := by
            rw [←eq2, hJ, mul_assoc]; apply mul_lt_mul_right (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) |>.mpr
            exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_add_left q y) (hy_pos.trans_le (le_add_left y q) |>.symm ▸ eq_iff_add_add_neg_add.mp rfl ▸ hv.symm ▸ rfl) -- v > q
          -- Integer between 2^L-1 and 2^L+1 is 2^L.
          cases lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ this) with
          | inl h => exfalso; apply Nat.lt_le_antisymm ‹_› h
          | inr h => exact h

        -- K * J * 2^(m-2) = 2^L * 1.
        -- Since J, K odd (factors of 2^L \pm 1), J*K must be 1.
        have odd_J : Odd J := Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (eq1 ▸ odd_factors)
        have odd_K : Odd K := Nat.Odd.of_mul_left (eq2 ▸ odd_factors_minus)
        have : J * K = 1 := by
           have : 2^(m-2) ∣ 2^L := Dvd.intro (J*K) (mul_comm _ _ ▸ ineq)
           have : m-2 ≤ L := (Nat.pow_dvd_pow_iff_le_right (by norm_num)).mp this
           rw [←Nat.mul_right_inj (pow_pos (by norm_num) (m-2))]
           rw [ineq, ←pow_add, Nat.sub_add_cancel ‹_›, mul_one]
           -- This implies J*K=1 ? No.
           -- 2^L = (J*K) * 2^(m-2).
           -- Since J*K is odd, it must be 1.
           rw [Nat.mul_right_eq_self_iff (pow_pos (by norm_num) _)] at ineq
           exact ineq
        have hJ1 : J = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right this
        have hK1 : K = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_left this
        
        -- If J=1, K=1.
        rw [hJ1] at eq1; rw [hK1] at eq2; rw [one_mul] at eq1 eq2
        rw [hJ1] at hJ; rw [hK1] at hK; rw [one_mul] at hJ hK
        -- u = 2^L+1, p = 2^(m-2).
        -- v = 2^(m-2), q = 2^L-1.
        -- check L = m-2.
        rw [ineq, one_mul] at h2k -- no ineq was JK2^(m-2)=2^L
        have : 2^(m-2) = 2^L := by rwa [hJ1, hK1, one_mul, one_mul] at ineq
        -- x = u - p = 2^L+1 - 2^(m-2) = 1.
        rw [←this] at eq1
        rw [eq1, hK]
        rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
    . -- Case 2: q is multiple, u is multiple.
      rcases h_u_div_or with hu | hv
      . -- Symmetric to case 1
        obtain ⟨K, hK⟩ := hq
        obtain ⟨J, hJ⟩ := hu
        rw [hK] at hpq; rw [hJ] at huv
        have hK_pos : 0 < K := by apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left; rw [←hK]; exact h_q_pos
        have hJ_pos : 0 < J := by apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_left; rw [←hJ]; exact h_u_pos
        have eq1 : J * v = 2^L + 1 := Nat.mul_left_cancel (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) (by rwa [mul_assoc, ←hJ])
        have eq2 : K * p = 2^L - 1 := Nat.mul_left_cancel (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) (by rwa [mul_assoc, ←hK])
        
        have : J * K * 2^(m-2) = 2^L := by
          have : 2^L + 1 > J * K * 2^(m-2) := by -- v > q => (2^L+1)/J > K 2^(m-2)
             rw [←eq1, hK, mul_comm J, mul_assoc]; apply mul_lt_mul_left hJ_pos |>.mpr
             exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_add_left q y) (hy_pos.trans_le (le_add_left y q) |>.symm ▸ eq_iff_add_add_neg_add.mp rfl ▸ hv.symm ▸ rfl)
          have : J * K * 2^(m-2) > 2^L - 1 := by -- u > p => J 2^(m-2) > (2^L-1)/K
             rw [←eq2, hJ, mul_assoc]; apply mul_lt_mul_right (pow_pos (by norm_num) _) |>.mpr
             exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_add_left p x) (hx_pos.trans_le (le_add_left x p) |>.symm ▸ eq_iff_add_add_neg_add.mp rfl ▸ hu.symm ▸ rfl)
          cases lt_or_eq_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ this) with | inl h => exfalso; apply Nat.lt_le_antisymm ‹_› h | inr h => exact h
          
        have : J * K = 1 := by
           rw [Nat.mul_right_eq_self_iff (pow_pos (by norm_num) _)] at this
           exact this
        have hJ1 : J = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_right this
        have hK1 : K = 1 := Nat.eq_one_of_mul_eq_one_left this
        
        rw [hJ1] at hJ; rw [hK1] at hK; rw [one_mul] at hJ hK
        rw [hJ1] at eq1; rw [one_mul] at eq1
        -- v = 2^L+1, q = 2^(m-2).
        -- y = v - q = 2^L+1 - 2^(m-2).
        have : 2^(m-2) = 2^L := by rwa [hJ1, hK1, one_mul, one_mul] at this
        rw [←this] at eq1
        rw [eq1, hK]
        rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
        -- y = 1.
        -- We need x = 1 too.
        -- u = 2^(m-2), p = 2^L-1.
        -- x = u - p = 2^(m-2) - (2^L-1) = 1.
        -- a = x * y = 1.
        rfl
      . exfalso; exact v_not_dvd ⟨hv, hq⟩

  exact final_step

have hm : 3 ≤ m := by
    have : 8 ≤ b + c := by
      have ha : 1 ≤ a := h₁.1.pos
      have hb : 3 ≤ b := by

      have hc : 5 ≤ c := by

  have hb_bound : b < 2^(m-1) := by
    rw [← Nat.mul_lt_mul_left (a := 2) (by norm_num), ← Nat.pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith)]
    calc 2 * b < b + c := by linarith [h₂.2.1]
         _     = 2^m   := h₅

  have hkm : m < k := by
    by_contra! hmk

    have roots : (b - a) * (b + a) = 2^m * (b - a) := by
      zify [le_of_lt h₂.1]
      calc (b:ℤ)^2 - a^2 = b^2 + b*c - (a^2 + b*c) := by ring
        _ = b*(b+c) - (a^2 + a*d) := by rw [← h₃]
        _ = b * 2^m - a * (a + d) := by rw [h₅, h₄]
        _ = 2^m * b - a * 2^k := by ring
        _ = 2^m * b - 2^m * 2^(k - m : ℕ) * a := by 
          rw [← mul_assoc, ← pow_add, Nat.add_sub_of_le hmk]

        _ = 2^m * (b - a) := by ring
    rw [Nat.mul_right_inj (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1)] at roots
    have : b + a < 2^m := by
      calc b + a < 2 * b := by linarith [h₂.1]
           _     < 2 * 2^(m-1) := mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num) hb_bound
           _     = 2^m := by rw [← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith)]
    linarith

    zify [le_of_lt h₂.1]
    calc (b:ℤ)^2 - a^2 = 2^m * b - a * 2^k := by
           rw [sq, sq, ← h₅, mul_add, mul_comm b c, ← h₃, add_comm (a*d), ← mul_add, h₄, mul_comm a, mul_comm b]
           ring
         _ = 2^m * b - 2^m * 2^(k-m) * a := by rw [← mul_assoc, ← pow_add, Nat.add_sub_of_le (le_of_lt hkm)]
         _ = 2^m * (b - 2^(k-m) * a) := by ring

  have h_val : padicValNat 2 (b - a) = 1 ∨ padicValNat 2 (b + a) = 1 := by
    have hsum : (b - a) + (b + a) = 2 * b := Nat.sub_add_add_cancel (le_of_lt h₂.1)
    have h_v2_sum : padicValNat 2 ((b - a) + (b + a)) = 1 := by 
      rw [hsum, padicValNat.mul 2 (by norm_num), padicValNat_self (by norm_num), padicValNat_eq_zero_of_not_dvd]
      · simp
      · rw [h₁.2.1]; norm_num

      · linarith

      rw [← h_v2_sum]

    have h_one_le : 1 ≤ min (padicValNat 2 (b-a)) (padicValNat 2 (b+a)) := by
      apply le_min
      · apply padicValNat.pos_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1).ne'
        rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
        rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_le (le_of_lt h₂.1), h₁.2.1, h₁.1]; rfl
      · apply padicValNat.pos_of_dvd (by norm_num) (by linarith)
        rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
        rw [Nat.add_mod, h₁.2.1, h₁.1]; rfl
    have h_min_eq : min (padicValNat 2 (b-a)) (padicValNat 2 (b+a)) = 1 := le_antisymm h_min_le h_one_le
    rw [min_eq_iff] at h_min_eq
    rcases h_min_eq with (h|h) <;> exact (or_iff_left_iff_imp.mpr (λ _ ↦ h.1)).symm.trans (or_iff_right_iff_imp.mpr (λ _ ↦ h.1))

  rcases h_val with h_va | h_vb
  · have : 2^(m-1) ∣ (b + a) := by
      have h_prod_val : padicValNat 2 (b - a) + padicValNat 2 (b + a) ≥ m := by
        rw [← padicValNat.mul (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1) (by linarith), h_eq]
        apply le_trans (le_refl m)
        apply le_add_right
        exact zero_le _
      apply padicValNat.dvd_of_le
      linarith
    have : b + a = 2^(m-1) := by
      apply Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_div_eq_one this
      apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_of_lt (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd this)
      rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by positivity), one_mul]
      calc b + a < 2 * b := by linarith [h₂.1]
           _     < 2 * 2^(m-1) := mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num) hb_bound

    rw [this] at h_eq
    have : 2^(k - m + 1) * a = 2^(m-1) := by
      have : (b - a) * 2^(m-1) = 2^(m-1) * (2 * (b - 2^(k-m) * a)) := by
        rw [h_eq, mul_assoc, ← pow_succ]
      rw [Nat.mul_right_inj (pow_pos (by norm_num) _)] at this

      linarith
    have : a ∣ 2^(m-1) := Dvd.intro_left _ this.symm
    rcases Nat.dvd_prime_pow (by norm_num) this with ⟨x, hx⟩
    rw [hx] at h₁
    rw [hx]
    simp at h₁
    rw [h₁.1, pow_zero]
  
  · have : 2^(m-1) ∣ (b - a) := by
      have h_prod_val : padicValNat 2 (b - a) + padicValNat 2 (b + a) ≥ m := by
        rw [← padicValNat.mul (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1) (by linarith), h_eq]
        apply le_trans (le_refl m)
        apply le_add_right
        exact zero_le _
      apply padicValNat.dvd_of_le
      linarith
    have : b - a ≥ 2^(m-1) := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1) this
    linarith [hb_bound]

  have hk_upper : k ≤ 2 * m - 2 := by

        have : 4 = 2^2 := rfl; rw [this, Nat.pow_div]; linarith; linarith] at this
      exact this
    have h_real : (2:ℝ)^k ≤ a + 2^(2*m - 2) / a := by
      have : (a:ℝ) * (2^k - a) ≤ 2^(2*m - 2) := by norm_cast
      have ha : (a:ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast; exact h₀.1
      rw [mul_sub] at this

  have h_factors : ∃ x y, v - u = 2 * x ∧ v + u = 2 * y ∧ y > x ∧

    have : w ≠ -2 := by zify at h; linarith
    rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne this with hw | hw
    · have : w + 1 ≤ -2 := by linarith
      have : -w - 3 ≥ 0 := by linarith
      have : (2 : ℚ) ^ (-w - 3) ≥ 1 := one_le_pow_of_one_le (by norm_num) _
      linarith [rpow_pos_of_pos (by norm_num : (0:ℚ)<2) (w+1)]
    · have : w + 1 ≥ 0 := by linarith

  let v := (b - a) / 2
  have huv_add : u + v = b := by
    dsimp [u, v]; rw [← Nat.add_div_of_dvd_right (by decide)];
    rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel_of_le (le_of_lt hab), Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by decide)];
    exact (Nat.even_add.mpr ⟨h₁.1, h₁.2.1⟩)
  have huv_sub : u - v = a := by
    apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_left (by decide)
    rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, ← huv_add, Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_sub_add_left]
    dsimp [v]; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.even_sub (le_of_lt hab) |> (·.2 h₁.2.1 h₁.1))]
    rw [huv_add]; exact Nat.add_sub_cancel_left a b

  have h_eq : (4:ℤ) * u * v = (u + v) * 2^m - (u - v) * 2^k := by
    zify; rw [huv_add, huv_sub, h₄, h₅, ← h₃]; ring

  have h_div_uv : 2^(m-2) ∣ u * v := by
    have hK : ∃ K, k = m + K := ⟨k - m, (Nat.add_sub_of_le (le_of_lt hmk)).symm⟩
    rcases hK with ⟨K, rfl⟩
    zify at h_eq ⊢
    rw [pow_add, ← mul_assoc] at h_eq
    have : (2:ℤ)^m ∣ 4 * u * v := Dvd.intro (u + v - (u - v) * 2^K) h_eq
    have : (2:ℤ)^2 * 2^(m-2) ∣ 4 * u * v := by rw [← pow_add, ← zify_nat_cast_pow, Nat.add_sub_of_le hm3] at this; exact this
    exact Int.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left (by decide) this

  have hb_bound : b < 2^(m-1) := by
    have : 2 * b < 2^m := by rw [← h₅]; linarith
    rw [← Nat.pow_succ', ← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_trans (by decide) hm3)] at this
    exact Nat.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (by decide)

  have hv_small : v < 2^(m-2) := by
    have : 2 * v < 2^(m-1) := by 
      rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_trans (by decide) hm3), pow_succ']; 
      dsimp [v]; rw [Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.even_sub (le_of_lt hab) |> (·.2 h₁.2.1 h₁.1))]; 
      exact (Nat.sub_le _ _).trans_lt hb_bound
    exact Nat.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (by decide)

  have hu_val : u = 2^(m-2) := by
    have h_parity : (Odd u ∧ Even v) ∨ (Even u ∧ Odd v) := by
      have : Odd (u + v) := by rw [huv_add]; exact h₁.2.1
      cases Nat.odd_add.mp this <;> simp [*]
    rcases h_parity with ⟨_, hv_even⟩ | ⟨_, hv_odd⟩
    · exfalso
      have : 2^(m-2) ∣ v := Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left (Nat.odd_iff.mp (by assumption) _ (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨by decide, by linarith⟩)) h_div_uv
      exact (Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt this hv_small).elim (Nat.div_pos (Nat.sub_le_sub_right hbc _) (by decide)).ne.symm
    · have : 2^(m-2) ∣ u := Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_right (Nat.odd_iff.mp (by assumption) _ (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨by decide, by linarith⟩)) h_div_uv
      have hu_bound : u < 2^(m-1) := by
        dsimp [u]; rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (by decide)];
        calc a + b < b + b := by gcongr; exact hab
             _ < 2 * 2^(m-1) := by rw [← Nat.pow_succ', Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_trans (by decide) hm3)]; exact Nat.mul_lt_mul_left (by decide) hb_bound
      exact (Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_div_eq_one this (Nat.eq_of_le_of_le_succ (Nat.div_ge_one_of_le (Nat.le_of_dvd (by dsimp [u]; linarith) this)) (by rw [Nat.div_lt_iff_lt_mul (Nat.pow_pos (by decide) _)]; exact hu_bound))).symm

  have h_pow2 : a * 2^k = 2^(2*m-2) := by
    zify; rw [← h₃, h₄, ← sub_add_cancel (2^k) a, mul_add, mul_sub, ← pow_two]; 
    have : b = 2^(m-1) - a := by rw [← Nat.div_mul_cancel (Nat.even_add.mpr ⟨h₁.1, h₁.2.1⟩), hu_val, ← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_trans (by decide) hm3)] at huv_add; zify at huv_add ⊢; linarith
    have : c = 2^(m-1) + a := by zify at this h₅ ⊢; linarith
    rw [this, ‹b = _›]; ring
    rw [← pow_mul, Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib]; norm_num

  have : Nat.Coprime a (2^(2*m-2)) := Nat.Coprime.pow_right _ (Nat.odd_iff.mp h₁.1).symm
  exact Nat.Coprime.eq_one_of_dvd this (Dvd.intro (2^k) h_pow2)

have hac : a < c := h₂.1.trans h₂.2.1
  have hkm : m < k := by
    have : a * (b + c) < a * (a + d) := by
      zify [h₂.1, hac]
      calc (a:ℤ) * (b + c) = a * b + a * c := by ring
        _ < a * b + a * c + (b - a) * (c - a) := lt_add_of_pos_right _ (mul_pos (sub_pos.2 h₂.1) (sub_pos.2 hac))
        _ = a * a + b * c := by ring
        _ = a * (a + d) := by rw [h₃]; ring
    replace : b + c < a + d := lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (le_of_lt h₀.1)
    rw [h₄, h₅] at this
    exact (pow_lt_pow_iff_right one_lt_two).mp this
  have hm : 2 ≤ m := by
    have : 4 ≤ b + c := add_le_add (Nat.succ_le_of_lt h₂.1) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt h₂.2.1)
    rw [h₅] at this; exact (pow_le_pow_iff_right one_lt_two).mp this
  have hb : b < 2^(m-1) := by
    rw [← Nat.mul_lt_mul_left zero_lt_two, ← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel hm]
    calc 2 * b < b + c := lt_add_of_pos_right _ (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.2.1)
      _ = 2^m := h₅
  let x := b - a; let y := b + a
  have hxy : x * y = 2^m * (b - 2^(k-m) * a) := by
    zify [le_of_lt h₂.1, le_of_lt hkm]; trans (b:ℤ)^2 - a^2; ring
    rw [← sub_eq_of_eq_add' h₅.symm, ← sub_eq_of_eq_add' h₄.symm, h₃]
    ring_nf; rw [pow_sub _ (le_of_lt hkm)]; ring
  have h_odd : Odd (b - 2^(k-m) * a) := by
    refine Nat.Odd.sub_even h₁.2.1 (Even.mul_right (Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨Nat.sub_ne_zero_of_lt hkm, even_two⟩) _) ?_
    rw [← hxy]; exact Nat.zero_le _
  have hv2_prod : (x * y).trailingZeros = m := by
    rw [hxy, Nat.trailingZeros_mul (pow_ne_zero _ two_ne_zero), Nat.trailingZeros_pow two_ne_zero, Nat.Odd.trailingZeros h_odd, add_zero]
    rw [hxy]; apply ne_of_gt; exact mul_pos (pow_pos zero_lt_two _) (Nat.odd_iff.mp h_odd).pos
  have hv2_sum : (x + y).trailingZeros = 1 := by
    have : x + y = 2 * b := by zify [le_of_lt h₂.1]; ring
    rw [this, Nat.trailingZeros_mul two_ne_zero (ne_of_gt h₀.2.1), Nat.prime_two.trailingZeros_one, Nat.Odd.trailingZeros h₁.2.1, add_zero]
  have hy_val : y.trailingZeros = m - 1 := by
    have hne : x.trailingZeros ≠ y.trailingZeros := by
      intro h; have : 1 + x.trailingZeros ≤ (x + y).trailingZeros := by rw [← h]; apply Nat.le_trailingZeros_add_of_eq h
      rw [hv2_sum] at this; have : 1 ≤ x.trailingZeros := Nat.trailingZeros_pos.mpr (Even.dvd (Nat.Even.sub_odd (le_of_lt h₂.1) h₁.2.1 h₁.1)); linarith
    have hsum : x.trailingZeros + y.trailingZeros = m := by rw [← Nat.trailingZeros_mul (Nat.sub_ne_zero_of_lt h₂.1), hv2_prod]
    have hmin : min x.trailingZeros y.trailingZeros = 1 := by rw [← hv2_sum, Nat.trailingZeros_add_eq_min hne]
    cases lt_or_gt x.trailingZeros y.trailingZeros with
    | inl hl => rw [min_eq_left (le_of_lt hl)] at hmin; rw [hmin] at hsum; rw [← hsum]; simp
    | inr hr =>
      rw [min_eq_right (le_of_lt hr)] at hmin; rw [hmin] at hsum
      have : 2^(m-1) ≤ x := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1) (Nat.dvd_of_trailingZeros_le (le_of_eq hsum.symm))
      have : x < 2^(m-1) := lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.sub_lt_self h₀.1 h₂.1) (le_of_lt hb); linarith
  have : b + a = 2^(m-1) := by
    apply le_antisymm
    · calc b + a < b + b := add_lt_add_left h₂.1 _
        _ < 2 * 2^(m-1) := by rw [← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel hm, h₅]; linarith
    · exact Nat.dvd_of_trailingZeros_le (le_of_eq hy_val.symm)
  have : a * 2^k = 2^(2 * m - 2) := by
    rw [← this, ← pow_two]; zify [h₀.1]; rw [h₄, h₅, h₃]
    trans a^2 + b * (b + 2 * a); ring; rw [← Nat.mul_two, ← mul_add, this, ← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel hm, h₅, h₃, mul_comm, mul_add]
    rw [← mul_assoc, mul_comm a, mul_assoc, ← pow_two, ← mul_add, h₄]
  have : a = 1 := by
    have : a = 2^(2 * m - 2 - k) := by
       rw [← Nat.div_eq_of_eq_mul_right (pow_pos zero_lt_two k) this.symm]
       apply Nat.pow_div (le_trans (le_of_lt hkm) (by linarith)) 
    rw [this] at h₁
    cases (2 * m - 2 - k)
    · rfl
    · simp at h₁
  exact this

have h_m_ge_2 : m ≥ 2 := by
    have : b + c ≥ 4 := by
      have : b ≥ 1 := h₀.2.1
      have : c ≥ 3 := by
        apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
        apply lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.succ_le_of_lt h₂.1) h₂.2.1
      linarith
    rw [h₅] at this
    exact (Nat.pow_ge_two_iff one_lt_two).mp this

  have h_bc_lt_ad : b + c < a + d := by
    apply lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 zero_le_two
    rw [add_sq, add_sq, h₃]
    zify [h₂.1, h₂.2.1, h₂.2.2]
    ring_nf
    rw [h₃]
    apply add_lt_add_right
    rw [sq_lt_sq]
    rw [abs_of_nonneg (by linarith), abs_of_nonneg (by linarith)]
    linarith

  have h_m_lt_k : m < k := by
    rw [h₄, h₅] at h_bc_lt_ad
    exact (pow_lt_pow_iff_right one_lt_two).mp h_bc_lt_ad

  have h_eq : b^2 - a^2 = 2^m * b - 2^k * a := by
    zify [le_of_lt h₂.1]
    calc (b:ℤ)^2 - a^2 = b*(b+c) - a*(a+d) := by rw [h₃]; ring
      _ = b*2^m - a*2^k := by rw [h₄, h₅]

  have h_prod_val : (b - a).factorization 2 + (b + a).factorization 2 = m := by
    rw [← Nat.factorization_mul (Nat.sub_ne_zero_of_lt h₂.1) (Nat.add_ne_zero h₀.2.1 h₀.1)]
    rw [nat_sub_mul_nat_add_eq_sub_sq, h_eq]
    rw [mul_comm b, mul_comm a]
    rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt h_m_lt_k), pow_add]
    rw [mul_assoc (2^m), ← Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib]
    rw [Nat.factorization_mul (by norm_num) (by 
          apply Nat.pos_of_mul_pos_right (b := 2^m) (by norm_num)
          rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, ← pow_add, Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt h_m_lt_k)]
          rw [mul_comm a, mul_comm b, ← h_eq]
          exact Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.pow_lt_pow_left h₂.1 zero_lt_two))]
    rw [Nat.prime_two.factorization_pow, add_left_eq_self]
    apply Nat.factorization_eq_zero_of_odd
    rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even]
    intro h_even
    have : Odd (b - 2 ^ (k - m) * a) := by
      apply Odd.sub_even h₁.2.1
      rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt h_m_lt_k)]
      rw [pow_add, mul_assoc]
      apply Even.mul_right
      exact (Nat.even_pow (by linarith)).mpr (by norm_num)
    exact (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp this) h_even

  have h_ba_val : (b + a).factorization 2 = m - 1 := by
    have h_min : min ((b - a).factorization 2) ((b + a).factorization 2) = 1 := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · rw [← Nat.factorization_two, ← mul_one 2]
        apply Nat.min_le_factorization_sub
        rw [Nat.add_sub_sub_cancel]
      · apply le_min
        · exact Nat.factorization_le_of_dvd (Nat.dvd_sub' (le_of_lt h₂.1)) (Nat.even_iff.mp (Nat.even_sub_of_odd h₁.2.1 h₁.1))
        · exact Nat.factorization_le_of_dvd (dvd_refl _) (Nat.even_iff.mp (Odd.add_odd h₁.2.1 h₁.1))
    
    cases eq_min_iff.mp h_min with
    | inl h => 
      rw [h] at h_prod_val
      exact Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq h_prod_val.symm
    | inr h =>
      exfalso
      rw [h] at h_prod_val
      have v_diff : (b - a).factorization 2 = m - 1 := Nat.eq_sub_of_add_eq h_prod_val
      have : 2^(m-1) ≤ b - a := Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1) (Nat.pow_dvd_of_le_factorization (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h₂.1) (le_of_eq v_diff.symm))
      have b_bound : b < 2^(m-1) := by
        have : 2*b < 2^m := by rw [← h₅]; linarith [h₂.2.1]
        exact Nat.lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this (by norm_num)
      linarith [Nat.sub_lt_self h₀.1 h₂.1]

  have h_ba_eq : b + a = 2^(m-1) := by
    apply Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_lt_of_pos
    · exact Nat.pow_dvd_of_le_factorization (Nat.add_pos_left h₀.2.1 h₀.1) (le_of_eq h_ba_val.symm)
    · calc b + a < b + c := Nat.add_lt_add_left h₂.2.1 b
           _ = 2^m := h₅
           _ = 2^(m-1) * 2 := by rw [pow_succ, mul_comm]
    · exact Nat.add_pos_left h₀.2.1 h₀.1

  have : a * 2^(k - m + 1) = 2^(m-1) := by
    have h_sub : b - a = 2 * b - 2^(k - m + 1) * a := by
      apply Nat.eq_of_mul_eq_mul_right (pow_pos zero_lt_two (m-1))
      rw [← h_ba_eq, nat_sub_mul_nat_add_eq_sub_sq, h_eq]
      rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib, ← mul_assoc, ← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_pred_of_lt h_m_ge_2)]
      rw [← mul_assoc, ← pow_add]
      congr 2
      rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc (le_of_lt h_m_lt_k) 1, add_comm, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_pred_of_lt h_m_ge_2)]
    zify at h_sub
    have : (2^(k - m + 1) - 1) * (a:ℤ) = b := by linarith
    have : 2^(k - m + 1) * (a:ℤ) = a + b := by linarith
    rw [h_ba_eq] at this
    norm_cast at this
    rw [mul_comm] at this; exact this

  exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_two_pow (Dvd.intro _ this) h₁.1

have hbc : b < c := h₂.2.1
  have b_lt_2m_1 : b < 2 ^ (m - 1) := by
    cases m with
    | zero => simp [h₅] at hbc; linarith
    | succ m' =>
      rw [show m' + 1 - 1 = m' by rfl]
      have : 2 * b < b + c := by omega
      rw [h₅] at this
      rw [pow_succ, mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num)] at this
      exact this
  have ad_gt_bc : b + c < a + d := by
    zify at h₀ h₂ h₃ ⊢
    have : (a:ℤ) * (a + d) > a * (b + c) := by
      rw [mul_add, mul_add, h₃]
      have : (a:ℤ) * a + b * c - (a * b + a * c) = (b - a) * (c - a) := by ring
      rw [←sub_pos, this]
      apply mul_pos
      · exact sub_pos.mpr (Int.ofNat_lt_ofNat_of_lt h₂.1)
      · exact sub_pos.mpr (Int.ofNat_lt_ofNat_of_lt (lt_trans h₂.1 h₂.2.1))
    apply lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left (a:=(a:ℤ)) this (Int.ofNat_pos.mpr h₀.1)
  have km : m < k := by
    rw [h₄, h₅] at ad_gt_bc
    exact (pow_lt_pow_iff_right (by norm_num)).mp ad_gt_bc

  have eq_sq : (b + a) * (b - a) = 2^m * b - 2^k * a := by
    zify
    trans (b:ℤ) * 2^m - a * 2^k
    · rw [←h₅, ←h₄, mul_add, mul_add, h₃]; ring
    · rw [sq_sub_sq]; ring

  have m_ge_2 : m ≥ 2 := by
    by_contra h
    interval_cases m
    · simp [h₅] at hbc; linarith
    · simp [h₅] at hbc; linarith

  have one_div : 2^(m-1) ∣ b + a ∨ 2^(m-1) ∣ b - a := by
    let x := (b + a) / 2
    let y := (b - a) / 2
    have hx : b + a = 2 * x := (Nat.two_mul_div_two_of_even (Nat.odd_add.mp h₁.2.1).mpr h₁.1).symm
    have hy : b - a = 2 * y := (Nat.two_mul_div_two_of_even (Nat.odd_sub h₂.1.le).mpr ⟨h₁.2.1, h₁.1⟩).symm
    have xy_odd : Odd (x + y) := by
      have : 2 * (x + y) = 2 * b := by rw [mul_add, ←hx, ←hy, Nat.add_sub_of_le h₂.1.le, two_mul]
      rw [mul_right_inj (by norm_num : 0 < 2)] at this
      rw [this]; exact h₁.2.1
    have prod_div : 2^(m-2) ∣ x * y := by
      have : 4 * (x * y) = (b+a)*(b-a) := by rw [hx, hy]; ring
      rw [eq_sq] at this
      have : 2^m ∣ 4 * (x * y) := by rw [this]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
      rw [show 2^m = 4 * 2^(m-2) by rw [←pow_add, Nat.add_sub_of_le m_ge_2]; rfl] at this
      exact Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left (by norm_num) this
    cases Nat.even_or_odd x with
    | inl he =>
      left
      have : 2^(m-2) ∣ x := Nat.coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_right (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd.mpr (mt Nat.even_iff_two_dvd.mp (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp (by rwa [Nat.even_add he] at xy_odd)))) prod_div
      rw [hx, show m-1 = (m-2)+1 by omega, pow_succ]; exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 2 this
    | inr ho =>
      right
      have : 2^(m-2) ∣ y := Nat.coprime.dvd_of_dvd_mul_left (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd.mpr (mt Nat.even_iff_two_dvd.mp (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp (by rwa [Nat.odd_add ho] at xy_odd)))) prod_div
      rw [hy, show m-1 = (m-2)+1 by omega, pow_succ]; exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 2 this

  have sum_eq : b + a = 2^(m-1) := by
    cases one_div with
    | inl h =>
      have : b + a < 2^m := by
        apply lt_trans (Nat.add_lt_add_left h₂.1 b)
        rw [←two_mul]; rw [h₅] at b_lt_2m_1
        rw [show 2^m = 2*2^(m-1) by rw [←pow_succ, show m-1+1=m by omega]]
        exact Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left b_lt_2m_1 (by norm_num)
      apply Nat.eq_of_dvd_of_div_eq_one h
      apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) h)
      rw [←pow_succ, show m-1+1=m by omega]; exact this
    | inr h =>
      have : b - a < 2^(m-1) := lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.sub_le b a) b_lt_2m_1
      have : b - a = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_dvd_of_lt h this
      exfalso; exact (Nat.sub_eq_zero_iff_le.mp this).not_lt h₂.1

  rw [sum_eq] at eq_sq
  have final_eq : b - a = 2 * b - 2^(k - m + 1) * a := by
    zify at eq_sq ⊢
    rw [show (2:ℤ)^m = 2 * 2^(m-1) by rw [←pow_succ, show m-1+1=m by omega]] at eq_sq
    rw [show (2:ℤ)^k = 2^(k-m+1) * 2^(m-1) by rw [←pow_add, show k-m+1+m-1 = k by omega]] at eq_sq
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_assoc] at eq_sq
    rw [←mul_sub, ←mul_sub] at eq_sq
    rw [Int.mul_eq_mul_left_iff (by positivity)] at eq_sq
    exact eq_sq
  zify at final_eq
  have : (a:ℤ) * 2^(k - m + 1) = a + b := by linarith
  rw [←Int.ofNat_add, sum_eq] at this
  have : a * 2^(k - m + 1) = 2^(m - 1) := Int.ofNat_inj.mp this
  have : a = 1 := by
    have : a ∣ 2^(m-1) := Dvd.intro (2^(k-m+1)) (this.symm)
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_pow_two this h₁.1
  exact this
